ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user resides */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the restaurant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine offered by the restaurant */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  "average_price" TEXT /* Average price of dishes in the restaurant */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the restaurant */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the restaurant */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant serves vegetarian food */,
  "is_non_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant serves non-vegetarian food */,
  "is_halal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant serves halal food */,
  "isDeliveryAvailable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the restaurant offers delivery services */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant related to the photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant providing the offer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offer or discount */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Date until the offer is valid */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer (e.g., discount, buy one get one free) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offer_photos" (
  "photo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each photo */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer related to the photo */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("photo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the restaurant or offer */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant involved in the interaction */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer involved in the interaction, if applicable */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, click, order) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the user's location during interaction */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the user's location during interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the order */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant related to the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was made */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order this item belongs to */,
  "dish_name" TEXT /* Name of the dish */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the dish ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the dish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "epic" TEXT /* Epic related to the user story */,
  "user_story" TEXT /* Description of the user story */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the user story */,
  "ready_to_plan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the story is ready to be planned */,
  "planned_sprint" INTEGER /* Sprint number planned for the user story */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user story (e.g., Completed, In progress) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_planned_sprint FOREIGN KEY ("planned_sprint") REFERENCES sprints ("sprint_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint */,
  "sprint_number" INTEGER /* Sprint number */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sprint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sprint */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sprint (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Goal of the sprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
